---
title: "Instruction Table"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Instruction Table}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

Participant-facing instruction text from the 13 norming datasets included in
`lexis`, extracted from source PDFs via LLM and stored as `norming_instructions`.

```{r}
library(lexis)
library(DT)
```

```{r}
DT::datatable(
  norming_instructions,
  rownames = FALSE,
  filter = "top",
  options = list(
    pageLength = 15,
    autoWidth = TRUE,
    scrollX = TRUE
  )
)
```
